title: Divine IT
description: Divine IT Limited is a CMMI Level 3 IT consultancy and software development company based in Bangladesh, established in 2005. The company specializes in creating ERP systems, security solutions, and various software applications for diverse industries. Their primary clients include enterprises and government organizations seeking robust IT solutions and support. With a commitment to excellence, Divine IT has received multiple awards for its innovative products, including the flagship PrismERP - Nova Provide tree and samples from stolen data to the company when its get in touch with support department.
